title: helichrysum buftonii
intro: Helichrysum buftonii, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a perennial plant species native to Australia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers that remain open and intact for a long period. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum buftonii lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Helichrysum buftonii is commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
